youtube.description:
The one and only Ali-A larper !
(im not Ali-A just someone who enjoyed his content as a kid!) 
! My target audience are teens, I dont really curse in my videos but from time to time there may be references to topics suited for older audiences ! 

Tiktok: @omgitslarpia
Email for enquiries only: omgitslarpia@gmail.com
Minecraft username : OMGITSLarpiA

Larpi-A // Subscribe and join the #LarpiA Army!

► Welcome to the best place for gaming news and gameplays! 

This is my place to share videos of me having fun playing games! I play on the Playstation 4 (PS4), Xbox One (XB1), Xbox 360, PS3 and even Wii U. Sometimes I'll play other games too!

► Check out my videos and "Subscribe" to see more - Enjoy! :D
